description_long: This is a promotional retail kiosk for Head & Shoulders, designed as a freestanding display unit with a curved, branded backdrop featuring a large image of a woman and prominent product advertising. The kiosk has a two-tiered shelving system, with the lower shelf holding multiple rows of shampoo bottles in various colors and the upper shelf displaying additional product lines. The left side features a vertical, sculpted product replica and decorative floral elements, while the right side is more streamlined with a focus on product arrangement. The base is sturdy and rectangular, with the Head & Shoulders logo prominently displayed on the front. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually appealing, intended to attract customers in high-traffic urban retail environments.
description: A modern, branded Head & Shoulders retail kiosk with curved signage, two-tiered shelving, and prominent product displays. Features a large promotional image, decorative elements, and a sturdy rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full product display, large promotional image, and decorative elements on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelving and the arrangement of products along the length of the kiosk.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with a clearer look at the product arrangement and the Head & Shoulders logo on the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the symmetry of the shelving and the product placement along the right edge.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, integrated into the curved backdrop and front base, with visible text including 'Head & Shoulders', '0%', and product information.
attribute_roof_design: Curved, decorative backdrop with no functional roof; made of printed plastic or cardboard with a smooth finish.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial promotional style with clean lines, branded graphics, and decorative elements.
